content:
The Class of 2021

Artists who minted their first work in 2021... or were minting art for years earlier are a strong signal of OG status. Collectoors who acquired art from the OGs are probably wondering...are they still around? MintFace has done the hard work so you can check.

Search The Line Directory by Line number, art genre and number of artworks minted.

Lens Based Art

470 Listings

Painting

16 Listings

Generative

21 Listings

3D

20 Listings

Illustration

241 Listings

Glitch

52 Listings

Artists Active in 2024

If you are new to collecting art as NFTs in 2025, I strongly recommend you look for artists that are active in the community and were minting art between 2021 and 2024.

You can find their entire collection on The Line. eg: Line 569 is Austine, Line 165 is Roya and Line 748 is Michael Hartley.
